mapper.select: /* 로그인용 사용자 조회 login.selectUser */ SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NM, U.EMAIL, U.PASSWD, U.PHONE, U.ORG_ID, U.USE_YN, U.LAST_LOGIN_DT, U.PWD_CHG_DT, U.LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, U.TWO_FA_YN, U.ACC_TP, U.ACCT_STATUS_CD, U.LOCK_DT, U.CREATE_DT, U.MODIFY_DT, U.CRTR_ID, U.MDFR_ID, O.ORG_ID, O.ORG_NM FROM ${dbId}.TB_USER U LEFT OUTER JOIN ${dbId}.TB_ORG O ON U.ORG_ID = O.ORG_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
/* 로그인 사용자 회사의 사용언어 목록 조회 login.selectLangList */ SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.LANG, B.LANG_NM FROM COM_COMP_LANG A LEFT JOIN COM_LANG B ON A.LANG = B.LANG WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORDER

/* 인사평가만 서비스 하는지 여부 login.selectIsOnlyInsa */ SELECT CASE WHEN LOCATE('03', A.SERVICE_TYPE) = 0 AND LOCATE('04', A.SERVICE_TYPE) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_ONLY_INSA_YN FROM COM_COMPINFO_DETAIL A WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND A.CURRENT_SEQ = 'Y'

/* 로그인 사용자의 연도별 성과조직 목록 조회 login.selectUserScDeptList */ SELECT M.YEAR, M.SC_DEPT_ID FROM V_ROLE_USER U JOIN ORG_INSA_DEPT_MAPPING M ON U.COMP_ID = M.COMP_ID AND U.DEPT_ID = M.DEPT_ID WHERE U.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND U.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY M.YEAR
mapper.update: /* 로그인 실패 횟수 초기화 login.resetLoginFailCnt */ UPDATE ${dbId}.TB_USER SET LOGIN_FAIL_CNT = 0, ACCT_STATUS_CD = '001', LOCK_DT = NULL, LAST_LOGIN_DT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* 감사 로그인 로그 등록 login.insertAuditLogin */ INSERT INTO ${dbId}.TB_AUDIT_LOGIN ( USER_ID, LOGIN_TP, ACCESS_TP, IP_ADDR, USER_AGENT, RESULT, FAIL_RSON, FAIL_CNT, TOKEN, OTP_STATUS, IP_STATUS, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginTp}, #{accessTp}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgent}, #{result}, #{failRson}, #{failCnt}, #{token}, #{otpStatus}, #{ipStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* OTP인증정보 조회 login.selectOTPAuth */ SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.USER_ID, IFNULL(B.OTP_USE_YN, 'N') AS OTP_USE_YN, IFNULL(C.OTP_IMG, '') AS OTP_IMG, IFNULL(C.OTP_KEY, '') AS OTP_KEY, IFNULL(C.REQ_DT, '') AS REQ_DT FROM ${dbId}.V_ROLE_USER A LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_COMPINFO B ON A.COMP_ID = B.COMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_OTP_AUTH C ON A.COMP_ID = C.COMP_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
/* 로그인 성공 핸들러 데이터 조회 login.selectLoginSuccessHandlerData */ SELECT 1 AS DUMMY, #{compId} AS COMP_ID, #{masterDbId} AS MASTER_DB_ID

association.column: {compId = COMP_ID, dbId = DB_ID, userId = USER_ID, masterDbId = MASTER_DB_ID}

mapper.select: /* 로그인용 조회 login.selectLoginProviderData */ SELECT 1 AS DUMMY, #{compId} AS COMP_ID, #{dbId} AS DB_ID, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{masterDbId} AS MASTER_DB_ID
